description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, rectangular layout and a flat roof. The exterior walls are finished in a light brick or stone texture, complemented by wooden doors and window frames. The property features a driveway with a parked car, bordered by manicured hedges and a lush green lawn. Several mature palm trees and broad-leaved trees are positioned around the house, providing shade and enhancing the landscape. The front entrance is centrally located, flanked by large windows that allow natural light into the main living spaces. The overall design is open and airy, with clear separations between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, brick exterior, and landscaped surroundings including a driveway, car, and several trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a car, and prominent landscaping with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, and the continuation of the lawn and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, large tree, and open grassy area with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and side entrance with additional greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
